svg.text: NC/ND GPU or CPU VMs — Scale-to-zero
Notes: Batch endpoints support multiple deployments with traffic splitting for A/B validation. Compute auto-scales 0→N and back to 0 after job completion (pay-per-use).
ParallelRunStep processes data in mini-batches across nodes. Output goes to Blob/SQL/downstream systems. Data drift monitoring triggers retraining alerts.
